claims.claim: Use structured telemetry concepts and standardized error/exception attributes rather than ad-hoc string matching only.
sources: OpenTelemetry exception semantic conventions for logs

claims.claim: Treat operations reliability as a software problem with automated routing/repair support.
Bind failure routing to artifact provenance and verification evidence.
Root-cause labels enable aggregate analysis and reveal common incident patterns.
sources: USENIX ATC 2023 AutoARTS root cause labeling paper

method: web.run current evidence refresh; sources used in final chat citations
